assertions.evidence: test_gemv_int4_v4.py ran successfully. Correctness tests PASSED at both shapes. N=4096,K=4096,gs=128: v4_t16 max_abs_err=0.001953 < 1e-2 [PASS]. N=11008,K=4096,gs=128: v4_t16 max_abs_err=0.000977 < 1e-2 [PASS]. All v4 variants (t4, t8, t16) passed both shapes.

Latency comparison reported for both shapes. N=4096,K=4096: v3=67.0us, v4_t16=80.1us (speedup=0.837x — v4 is 1.195x SLOWER). N=11008,K=4096: v3=107.1us, v4_t16=128.2us (speedup=0.835x — v4 is 1.198x SLOWER). Results are reported with numbers as required by assertion spec — the assertion says 'Results are reported (improvement or regression with numbers)' which means reporting is sufficient regardless of direction.
